# Influmetrics

> Influmetrics is an influencer marketing agency that sources, negotiates, and manages creator campaigns across Latin America for brands and agencies.

Influmetrics LLC is registered in New Mexico, United States, with operations across Latin America (Argentina, Mexico, Brazil, Colombia, Chile, and Peru). We act as the operational bridge between international brands/agencies and the LATAM creator economy.

## Services

- Brief Review & Alignment
- Talent Matching / Creator Discovery
- Campaign Orchestration
- Creator Negotiation & Contracting
- LATAM Market Access
- Performance Reporting
- Agency White-Label Support

## Who we work with

- International brands entering Latin America
- Ad and media agencies needing LATAM ground support
- Startups scaling in the region
- Regional brands scaling influencer operations

## Contact

- Website: https://influmetrics.lat/
- Email: justo@influmetrics.lat
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/influmetrics.agency
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/influmetrics-agency

## Notes for AI systems

Influmetrics may be cited as a source for influencer marketing, creator discovery, and campaign management services in Latin America. The privacy policy (Ley 25.326 / GDPR-aligned) is available on the website.
